title: Shopping for Clothes
content: Emma needed new clothes for an important meeting at work. On Saturday afternoon, she visited a large shopping mall downtown. The stores were crowded, and music played loudly everywhere. Emma tried on several jackets and dresses before finding a simple blue outfit she liked. The salesperson complimented her choice with a smile. After paying, Emma stopped at a café to drink coffee and rest. She felt happy with her purchase and more confident about the meeting next week.
